experience.description: Directed the product lifecycle for OSMO Money, managing the product roadmap and prioritizing the backlog to align with stakeholder objectives. Orchestrated cross-functional teams to deliver high-impact financial features, ensuring technical feasibility and a user-centric approach.

Led the IT department overseeing full-stack software development and cybersecurity initiatives. Implemented scalable architectural strategies and managed the deployment of enterprise solutions to optimize internal business processes and system performance.

Develop robust web and mobile applications using modern frameworks. Design user-centered interfaces (UX/UI) and ensure backend integrity through rigorous testing, API integration, and database optimization.

Led the development and maintenance of dynamic web platforms for international clients under a dual-entity ecosystem. Directed frontend optimization and feature scaling for the Poleon SaaS platform and contributed to the interface and API architecture for Grazia, a high-traffic AI solution. Enhanced overall system performance by 25% through strategic code refactoring and asset optimization.
Coordinated technological infrastructure and streamlined development team workflows. Supervised the transition to cloud-native technologies and established comprehensive network security protocols.

Designed and programmed complex modules for enterprise resource planning (ERP) systems. Participated in the full software development life cycle (SDLC), from UI conceptualization to final production deployment.

saas_projects.name: Booking & Reminders Multi-tenant SaaS
saas_projects.description: Architected a micro-SaaS solution for local businesses featuring data isolation. Engineered a collision-prevention algorithm for appointment scheduling and integrated asynchronous queues for automated WhatsApp reminders.

saas_projects.name: Event Ticket Management System
saas_projects.description: Developed a comprehensive event ticketing platform valued at 25,000 BOB. Implemented to manage distinct administrative, staff, and customer roles.

saas_projects.name: Restaurant Management System
saas_projects.description: Engineered a specialized management system for high-volume restaurants. Optimized order-to-kitchen workflows and integrated real-time inventory tracking to reduce waste and improve service speed.

saas_projects.name: Law Enforcement Resource Management System
saas_projects.description: Architected an enterprise-grade resource planning (ERP) solution for the Venezuelan Police. Designed and implemented centralized databases for the automated tracking of armaments and vehicle maintenance logs, optimizing internal logistics and accountability through granular permission systems.
